name: ruby-ffi-compiler
title: ruby-ffi-compiler
description:
Automating compilation of native libraries
ffi-compiler is a ruby library for automating compilation
of native libraries for use with ffi.
.
To use, define your own ruby->native API using ffi, implement
it in C, then use ffi-compiler to compile it.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-ffi-compiler because Automating compilation of native libraries.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-ffi-compiler as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-ffi-compiler with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-ffi-compiler --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
